title: Text sources manifest (ADR-046 + ADR-047 Milestone D)
description: Provenance manifest for editorial text. Each entry classifies a span of text in the app — mission description, planet copy, locale overlay string, etc. — as original, paraphrased, quoted, or translated, and links to its primary source. Lives alongside image-provenance.json so /credits shows a full bill of materials for both photos and text.

id.description: Stable id (slug). Used for deep-links from /credits.

location.description: Where the text lives in the repo. file is a path relative to the repo root; json_path is a dotted/JSONPath expression for structured data; i18n_key is the Paraglide message id for UI strings.

category.description: Which app surface the text appears on.

relationship.description: How the text relates to its source.

snippet.description: Short, human-readable preview shown on /credits (≤ 240 chars).

license_short.description: Short license name. For 'original' entries this is 'Orrery-Original' (project copyright).
